reviewer_note: oracle-pro unavailable (no Oracle MCP); fell back to codex exec (nightmare mode) per shared-references/reviewer-routing.md. Codex CLI 0.118.0 logged in with ChatGPT.
summary: Pilot BAV experiment did not produce publishable positive result. BAV (40/50) vs backward_cloze (39/50) paired-bootstrap p=0.66, so BAV's adaptive-escalation logic contributes no measurable gain over backward_cloze alone. MoT citation was wrong; FOBAR is closer prior art. Scale-up from N=50 is unlikely to close the gap. Author chose to terminate loop rather than continue through max 4 rounds.
